meaning: adj.欢迎的,<美俚>同性恋的,放荡的,快乐的n.<美俚> 同性恋者,尤指男性同性者
examples: I didn't know he was gay.
He has waffled on abortion and gay rights.
He has always championed the cause of gay rights.
He voiced staunch opposition to gay marriage when it was legalised in Argentina in 2010.
The Church of Scotland's governing body is to debate the issue of gay ministers.
